operational_knowledge_units.title: ExchangeSorterSideZone API sends multiple exchanges to tippers for testing
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The ExchangeSorterSideZone API requires a sorter side and a zone, and is used during testing to send multiple exchanges to the tippers.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'ExchangeSorterSideZone: Requires a sorter side and a zone. This is used during testing to send multiple exchanges to the tippers.'

relationships.target: sending multiple exchanges to tippers during testing

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: API capability for totes: ExchangeSorterSideZone requires sorter side and zone, and is used during testing to send multiple exchanges to the tippers.

operational_knowledge_units.title: RemoveTote API removes a tote after AGV removal prerequisite is met
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The RemoveTote API requires a tote ID and removes the tote from the system. The slide explicitly notes that the AGV must be removed before the tote can be removed.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'RemoveTote: Requires a tote id and will remove the tote from the system.'
Visible text: 'Note: the AGV must be removed before the tote can be removed.'

relationships.target: AGV must be removed before tote removal

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: RemoveTote API reference: requires tote ID, removes tote from the system, and has a prerequisite that the AGV must be removed before the tote can be removed.

operational_knowledge_units.title: GetToteTask API shows active tote state
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The GetToteTask API shows the active state of the totes.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'GetToteTask: Shows the active state of the totes.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: GetToteTask API shows the active state of the totes.

operational_knowledge_units.title: ResendtoteTask API resends a task to the robotics module
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The ResendtoteTask API requires a task GUID and resends the task to the robotics module.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'ResendtoteTask: Requires a task guid and will resend the task to the robotics module.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: ResendtoteTask API requires a task GUID and resends the task to the robotics module.

discarded_candidates.title: Tote API list as procedures
discarded_candidates.reason: Slide provides API capabilities, parameters, and one prerequisite note, but does not present explicit reusable action steps or a complete action sequence. Per rules, this should be captured as API context rather than procedures.
